name: Moktar Raider
flavor_text: The moktars don't raid Denethix because they hate civilization. They raid it because the granaries are right there.
art_prompt: A seven-foot-tall muscular humanoid with short tawny fur and a thick lion-like maned head crouches in an aggressive stance. Crude weapons—sharpened metal and looted swords—hang from its frame. Scavenged trophies dangle from its body. Behind it, weathered stone buildings and exposed concrete ruins of an ancient mega-structure loom.. Stylized digital illustration, dynamic tilted composition, warm fire-tones with high contrast, kinetic energy, post-apocalyptic science-fantasy setting.
design_notes: Clean red common vanilla. A 2/2 for 2 is the baseline for a common creature -- no frills, just a solid body. P+T=4, CMC+3=5, well within budget. Moktars are a key creature type in the setting as wilderness raiders, making this a natural flavor fit for red's aggressive identity.
